title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China unveiled JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid robot with a split AI brain for real-time control and perception. Vietnam demonstrated the Dyno and VR-H3 humanoids for security, home, factory, and remote work applications. NVIDIA released the Isaac GR00T robot platform with onboard processing power for researchers.
